toolSpec.name: search_places
toolSpec.description: Search for places using Amazon Location Service geo-places search_text API. Geocode the query using the geocode API to get BiasPosition. If no results, try a bounding box filter. Includes contact info and opening hours if present. Output is standardized and includes all fields, even if empty or not available.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

mode.description: Output mode: 'summary' (default) or 'raw' for all AWS fields

toolSpec.name: get_place
toolSpec.description: Get details for a place using Amazon Location Service geo-places get_place API. Output is standardized and includes all fields, even if empty or not available.

place_id.description: The unique PlaceId for the place

mode.description: Output mode: 'summary' (default) or 'raw' for all AWS fields

toolSpec.name: reverse_geocode
toolSpec.description: Reverse geocode coordinates to an address using Amazon Location Service geo-places reverse_geocode API.

toolSpec.name: geocode
toolSpec.description: Get coordinates for a location name or address using Amazon Location Service geo-places geocode API.

location.description: Location name or address to geocode

toolSpec.name: search_nearby
toolSpec.description: Search for places near a location using Amazon Location Service geo-places search_nearby API. If no results, expand the radius up to max_radius. Output is standardized and includes all fields, even if empty or not available.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

toolSpec.name: search_places_open_now
toolSpec.description: Search for places that are open now using Amazon Location Service geo-places search_text API and filter by opening hours. If no open places, expand the search radius up to max_radius. Uses BiasPosition from geocode.

initial_radius.description: Initial search radius in meters for expansion

toolSpec.name: calculate_route
toolSpec.description: Calculate a route and return summary info and turn-by-turn directions.

toolSpec.name: optimize_waypoints
toolSpec.description: Optimize the order of waypoints using Amazon Location Service geo-routes optimize_waypoints API (V2).

waypoints.description: List of intermediate waypoints, each as a dict with at least Position [longitude, latitude], optionally Id

mode.description: Output mode: 'summary' (default) or 'raw' for all AWS fields
